Source URL: https://www.uhapex.uh.edu/APEX/Program_Eligibility.asp

# Government Contracting Ready Route to APEX

## Reusable BOSS response pattern
For an existing legally formed for-profit business in the UH APEX service area with clear products/services and some capacity, route to APEX for procurement advising, registrations/certifications education, market research, solicitation assistance, and training.

## Handoff fields to capture
- Stage
- Business idea/current business
- Location ZIP/county
- Primary decision
- What has been done
- Revenue/customer evidence
- Documents available
- Special eligibility or language preference
- Recommended resource and why
